article_title: Bylaw 14770 — Housing Agreement (5938 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks in Affordable Rental Units at 5938 Olive Avenue Under New Housing Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council approved a legally binding housing agreement with Olive Properties Inc. requiring a portion of units in their new 39-storey development to be rented at below-market rates to income-qualifying tenants.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review how inclusionary housing rules may apply to your next development.
